revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Taiwan | shortname alias = Republic of China | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of China Army.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of China Air Force.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-football = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-basketball = Chinese Taipei {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | link alias-tennis = China {{{mw}}} Cup team | name alias-tennis = China | sortkey = China | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{For|associated data|Template:Country data Taiwan}} | var1 = civil | redir1 = ROC | redir2 = China, Republic of | related1 = Taiwan | related2 = Chinese Taipei | related3 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | cat = China republic </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_China here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_China for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Taiwan | shortname alias = Republic of China | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of China Army.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of China Air Force.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-football = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-basketball = Chinese Taipei {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | link alias-tennis = China {{{mw}}} Cup team | name alias-tennis = China | sortkey = China | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{For|associated data|Template:Country data Taiwan}} | var1 = civil | redir1 = ROC | redir2 = China, Republic of | related1 = Taiwan | related2 = Chinese Taipei | related3 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | cat = China republic </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
